mapper.select: SELECT ID, EQUIP_ID, EQUIP_ASSETS_CODE, PRICE, NET_VALUE, DEPRECIATION_LIMIT, ALREADY_LIMIT, DEL_FLAG, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, DELETE_BY, DELETE_BY_NAME, DELETE_TIME FROM E_M_EQPT_FINANCE WHERE EQUIP_ID = #{equipId} AND DEL_FLAG = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO E_M_EQPT_FINANCE ( ID, EQUIP_ID, EQUIP_ASSETS_CODE, PRICE, NET_VALUE, DEPRECIATION_LIMIT, ALREADY_LIMIT, DEL_FLAG, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME ) VALUES ( #{id,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{equipId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{equipAssetsCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{price,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{netValue,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{depreciationLimit,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{alreadyLimit,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, 0, #{loginUserId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{loginUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE E_M_EQPT_FINANCE
EQUIP_ASSETS_CODE = #{equipAssetsCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
PRICE = #{price,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
NET_VALUE = #{netValue,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
DEPRECIATION_LIMIT = #{depreciationLimit,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
ALREADY_LIMIT = #{alreadyLimit,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}
WHERE ID = #{id}

UPDATE E_M_EQPT_FINANCE SET DEL_FLAG = 1, DELETE_BY = #{loginUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, DELETE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DELETE_TIME = #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} WHERE EQUIP_ID = #{equipId}
